series_metadata.series_description: Case files from Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) investigative units pertaining to criminal investigations that result in felony charges not rising to those stipulated in ORC section 2901.13(A)(3), 2903.01, 2903.02, 2907.02, and 2907.03. Records include, but are not limited to, request for assistance, reports, evidence submission sheets, custody records, recordings, subpoenas, laboratory notes, and photos.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 10 years from case closing, unless scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years from case closing., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
